trans-unit.target: Overview of all available data records
Emergency service deployments recorded in IVENA with their details.
Indicates who initiated the hospital selection, e.g. patient, physician, or emergency service.
Specialized clinical units within a medical field, e.g. Cardiology or General Surgery.
Regions covered by emergency dispatch centers
Facilities delivering medical care and patient services.
Preliminary suspected diagnosis summarizing the primary medical problem or injury at the scene.
Potential infectious diseases that may require isolation at the destination hospital.
Mass casualty incidents recorded in IVENA with their associated operational and medical details.
Origins or contexts of an emergency case, such as public space, doctor’s office, or home environment.
Secondary transport types for inter-hospital or follow-up transfers.
Overarching medical fields such as Internal Medicine or Surgery.

This form allows you to link a raw indication with a corresponding normalized indication from the standardized list. By selecting the appropriate normalized indication, you help ensure consistent data classification and make further analysis and reporting more accurate.
Your registration was almost successful. Please check your inbox and click the verification link to activate your account. You can sign in afterwards.
If your account exists and your email is verified, a password reset link was sent.
Manage your account profile, email, and password.
Choose which emails you want to receive.
For security, please enter your password again before changing your email address.

This export is large ({count, number} records). Review your filters before downloading.
